channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: What Happens After Hungary’s Election? Four Scenarios to Watch
item.description: Hungary’s election could mark a democratic turning point—or trigger a crisis: concession, gray zone tactics, or outright contestation. This analysis outlines four scenarios and the stakes for Hungary and Europe.

item.title: Deepening Strategic Alignment: Priorities for the U.S.-Japan Alliance
item.description: As the United States and Japan face an increasingly uncertain global environment, it is an important time for the two governments to deepen their strategic alignment and strengthen U.S.-Japan alliance cooperation.
